title: PaulPack
description: A Vanilla-ish modpack with many QoL additions and some minor changes to gameplay
body:
This modpack was created at the request of a friend who wanted a modded Minecraft experience that stays true to the essence of Vanilla gameplay while having enhanced combat mechanics similar to Minecraft Dungeons. If you enjoy the feel of Vanilla Minecraft but miss the fast-paced combat style with some QoL additions, this modpack is for you.

### **Features:**

- **Vanilla-Plus Gameplay**
- **Optimized Performance**
- **Minimalistic Approach** 
- **Enhanced & Amplified World Generation**
- **Combat Mechanics:** Temporary use of **_Old Combat Mod_** until **_Better Combat_** gets updated.
